sentences.arabic: بِرُّ الْوَالِدَيْنِ مِنَ الْأَعْمَالِ الَّتِي تُدْخِلُ الْجَنَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Dobročinstvo prema roditeljima je jedno od djela koja uvode u Džennet.
sentences.translationEn: Kindness to parents is one of the deeds that lead to Paradise.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ رَجُلٌ رَسُولَ اللهِ: مَنْ أَحَقُّ النَّاسِ بِحُسْنِ صَحَابَتِي؟
sentences.translation: Jedan čovjek je upitao Allahovog Poslanika: 'Ko je najpreči mom lijepom druženju?'
sentences.translationEn: A man asked the Messenger of Allah: 'Who among the people is most deserving of my good companionship?'

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: «أُمُّكَ، ثُمَّ أُمُّكَ، ثُمَّ أُمُّكَ، ثُمَّ أَبُوكَ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، 5971].
sentences.translation: Rekao je: 'Tvoja majka, zatim tvoja majka, zatim tvoja majka, pa onda tvoj otac.' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o adabu, 5971].
sentences.translationEn: He said: 'Your mother, then your mother, then your mother, then your father.' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners, 5971].

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْوَلَدِ أَنْ يُطِيعَ وَالِدَيْهِ وَيُسَاعِدَهُمَا بِإِحْسَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je dužno da se pokorava svojim roditeljima i da im pomaže na najbolji način.
sentences.translationEn: A child must obey his parents and help them with excellence.

sentences.arabic: الدُّعَاءُ لَهُمَا وَاجِبٌ بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ وَفِي كُلِّ حِينٍ.
sentences.translation: Upućivanje dove za njih je obaveza nakon namaza i u svakom trenutku.
sentences.translationEn: Praying for them is a duty after prayer and at all times.

sentences.arabic: رِضَا اللهِ يَكُونُ فِي رِضَا الْوَالِدَيْنِ عَنِ الْأَبْنَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Allahovo zadovoljstvo se krije u zadovoljstvu roditelja njihovom djecom.
sentences.translationEn: Allah's pleasure is found in the parents' pleasure with their children.
